select * from writes, track, artist where writes.artist_id = artist.artist_id and track.track_id = writes.track_id and track.track_title = 'Californication';
select Artist.name from Track, Writes, Artist where Track.track_title='Californication' and track.track_id = writes.track_id and writes.artist_id = Artist.artist_id ;
select b.name from writes a, artist b, Track c where a.artist_id=b.artist_id and c.track_id=a.track_id and c.track_title='Californication';

select distinct artist.name, writes.role from artist, writes, track WHERE artist.artist_id = writes.artist_id AND role = 'lyricist' AND writes.track_id = track.track_id AND track_title = 'Californication';
select name from Artist, Writes, Track where Track.title='Californication'
select name from Track natural join Writes natural join Artist where track_title = 'Californication';
select name from Track, Writes, Artist where Track.track_id = Writes.track_id AND Writes.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND track_title == 'Californication';
select name, role from Track, Writes, Artist where Writes.artist_id=Artist.artist_id and Track.track_id = Writes.track_id and Track.track_title = 'Californication';
select name, role from Track, Writes, Artist where track.track_title = 'Californication' and Track.track_id = Writes.track_id and Writes.artist_id = Artist.artist_id
select name, role from artist, writes, track where writes.artist_id = artist.artist_id and track.track_id = writes.track_id and track.track_title = 'Californication';
